channel.title: International Journal of Food Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Journal of Food Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Cellulose particles filled oil-in-water emulsion: a facile strategy to prepare edible oleogels
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0236

item.title: Identification of barley-derived peptides with angiotensin converting enzyme inhibitory activity
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0255

item.title: Multiphysics simulation for microwave-assisted continuous flow in a tube flow reactor with a mode stirrer
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2023-0012

item.title: Regulation of Pleurotus geesteranus protein particle characteristics on the microstructure and rheology of their W1/O/W2 double emulsions
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0207

item.title: Effect of soybean protein isolate, transglutaminase, and konjac glucomannan on the cooking and eating quality and digestibility of rice noodles
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0213

item.title: Effect of different protease on the hydrolysis degree and antigenicity of cow milk protein
item.description: Article by Xiaojun Chu, Ling Li, Ruosi Fang, Guipu Li, Lina Xiong, Donghong Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ijfe-2024-0136
